meta.phase: Phase 8 — Hiring Funnel with Realistic Numbers

stages.name: Job Descriptions Published
stages.details: 5 JDs live across LinkedIn, Naukri, Internshala, and company careers page. Total reach: 48,000 impressions.

stages.name: Applications Received
stages.note: Simulated batch — 30 realistic candidates generated for demonstration
stages.realistic_note: In a real deployment for these 5 roles, expect 300–350 applications across Indian job portals

stages.name: AI Resume Parsing (Phase 3)
stages.insight: All 30 resumes parsed. In real deployment, handles 300+ in <30 seconds.

stages.name: ATS Screening (≥55 threshold)
stages.insight: 8 candidates below 55 — primarily freshers with poor skill match or non-tech role transferees.

stages.name: Shortlisted (≥65 threshold)
stages.insight: 19 candidates meet the shortlist bar. 3 additional candidates scored 55–64 — placed on watchlist.

stages.name: Bias Audit Review
bias_flags: Institution tier skew — 2 Tier-1 candidates may have been over-scored
Employment gap flag — 1 candidate's gap context not captured
English fluency proxy — 1 candidate's score potentially impacted
stages.insight: 4 candidates flagged for manual recruiter review before interview scheduling.

stages.name: HR Screening Call (15-min)
drop_reasons: 1 candidate's expected CTC was 3x the budgeted range
stages.insight: 3 dropped post-HR call. 16 proceed to technical interview.

stages.name: Technical Interview (Round 1)
drop_reasons: 1 Software Engineer could not solve medium-level DSA question
1 Data Analyst had incorrect SQL fundamentals
stages.insight: 14 advance. AI-generated questions (Phase 5) used for consistent evaluation.

stages.name: Panel Interview (Round 2 — Behavioural + Managerial)
drop_reasons: 2 candidates showed poor cultural fit signals (no specifics cited — bias-mitigation rule)
1 candidate had poor conflict resolution skills
1 candidate asked inappropriate questions about team politics

stages.name: Offer Decision / Final Review
not_offer_reasons: 1 candidate — headcount freeze announced during process
1 candidate — final panel disagreed on seniority fit
stages.insight: 8 offers approved by hiring manager + HRBP.

stages.name: Offer Sent
stages.insight: 8 offer letters sent within 2.3 days of approval (target: <3 days — ✅ met).

stages.name: Offer Accepted
decline_reasons: Candidate chose a startup for ESOPs
stages.insight: 75% acceptance rate — above 68% industry benchmark. Indicates competitive offer quality.

stages.name: Joiners (Day 1)
stages.no_show_reason: Candidate ghosted — withdrew via WhatsApp 12 hours before joining date
stages.insight: Final pipeline conversion: 5 out of 30 (16.7%) — strong for a competitive, AI-screened process.

Cyber Security Analyst.note: CSA Joiner offered competed role at Palo Alto Networks — lost to competitor

Product Manager.note: Aditya Malhotra declined — accepted Director of PM role at a Series B startup

key_metrics.ai_time_saved_note: Estimated 34.5 hours of manual screening saved vs manual review of 30 applications
